basic_details.job_title: DHS Ariyalur Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 13 Security Guard, MPHW and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: District Health Society Ariyalur (DHS Ariyalur) has released the official Various Posts Notification 2026. A total of 13 vacancies have been announced under the DHS Ariyalur Recruitment 2026. Candidates up to 45 years of age for most posts and up to 59 years for the Unani Consultant post, possessing 8th Pass, Bachelor of Audiology and Speech Language Pathology, B.Pharm, D.Pharm, BUMS, MD/ MS, or other relevant qualifications, are eligible to apply offline on or before 17-07-2026. The official notification PDF and offline application details are available below.

age_limit.age_details: Max 45 years for most posts, Max 59 years for Unani Consultant
age_limit.details: Audiologist: Maximum 45 years CEmONC Security Guard: Maximum 45 years SNCU Cleaner: Maximum 45 years MPHW-Male / HI Grade II: Maximum 45 years MMU Cleaner: Maximum 45 years Unani Consultant - NPCDCS Scheme: Maximum 59 years Pharmacist - Unani-NPCDCS Scheme: Maximum 40 years Pharmacist - Siddha NRHM Scheme: Maximum 40 years

qualification.education_qualification: 8th Pass, Bachelor of Audiology and Speech language Pathology, B.Pharm or D.Pharm, BUMS, MDMS
qualification.details: Audiologist: Bachelor of Audiology and Speech language Pathology CEmONC Security Guard: 8th Pass SNCU Cleaner: 8th Pass MPHW-Male / HI Grade II: Two years Health Worker training recognized by Public Health Department MMU Cleaner: 8th Pass Unani Consultant - NPCDCS Scheme: BUMS, MDMS., (PG Qualification only) Pharmacist - Unani-NPCDCS Scheme: B.Pharm or D.Pharm from a recognized University Pharmacist - Siddha NRHM Scheme: B.Pharm or D.Pharm from a recognized University

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DHS Ariyalur Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 17-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: DHS Ariyalur Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the DHS Ariyalur Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download DHS Ariyalur Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: DHS Ariyalur Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Audiologist: Bachelor of Audiology and Speech language Pathology CEmONC Security Guard: 8th Pass SNCU Cleaner: 8th Pass MPHW-Male / HI Grade II: Two years Health Worker training recognized by Public Health Department MMU Cleaner: 8th Pass Unani Consultant - NPCDCS Scheme: BUMS, MDMS., (PG Qualification only) Pharmacist - Unani-NPCDCS Scheme: B.Pharm or D.Pharm from a recognized University Pharmacist - Siddha NRHM Scheme: B.Pharm or D.Pharm from a recognized University

content_sections.heading: DHS Ariyalur Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Audiologist: Maximum 45 years CEmONC Security Guard: Maximum 45 years SNCU Cleaner: Maximum 45 years MPHW-Male / HI Grade II: Maximum 45 years MMU Cleaner: Maximum 45 years Unani Consultant - NPCDCS Scheme: Maximum 59 years Pharmacist - Unani-NPCDCS Scheme: Maximum 40 years Pharmacist - Siddha NRHM Scheme: Maximum 40 years

content_sections.heading: DHS Ariyalur Selection Process 2026
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for DHS Ariyalur Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 17-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DHS Ariyalur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the District Health Society Ariyalur recruitment is 17th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in the DHS Ariyalur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 13 vacancies announced by the District Health Society Ariyalur for various contractual posts. These include positions like Audiologist, Security Guard, Cleaner, MPHW, and Pharmacist.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for the DHS Ariyalur recruitment?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification varies depending on the post. For some positions like Security Guard and Cleaner, an 8th Pass is sufficient. Other posts require higher qualifications such as a Bachelor's degree or specific training.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to the DHS Ariyalur posts?
faq.answer: The age limit generally ranges up to 45 years for most posts. However, for specific roles like Unani Consultant, the maximum age limit is extended to 59 years. Please check the official notification for exact details.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for DHS Ariyalur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it out, and send it via post to the address specified in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the various posts in DHS Ariyalur?
faq.answer: The salary for the posts ranges from Rs. 11,000 to Rs. 60,000 per month, depending on the specific post and its responsibilities. Higher-paying positions usually require specialized qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for DHS Ariyalur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: As per the information available, there is no application fee mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive. Candidates are advised to confirm this with the official advertisement.

faq.question: Q8. What documents are required to be submitted with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates are generally required to attach self-attested copies of relevant documents such as educational certificates, age proof, identity proof, and passport-sized photographs along with the application form.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF for DHS Ariyalur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is highly recommended to read the PDF thoroughly before applying for any post.

faq.question: Q10. What is the nature of the employment for these posts?
faq.answer: The posts announced by the District Health Society Ariyalur are on a contractual basis. This means the employment is for a fixed period, and candidates should be aware of the terms and conditions associated with contract jobs.
